channel.title: Shelby AI Deals
channel.description: Honest AI tool reviews for creators, freelancers, and small teams.

item.title: ElevenLabs vs Murf vs Play.ht: Best AI Voice Generator in 2026
item.description: Three AI voice generators tested head-to-head. Which one sounds most natural and delivers the best value?
item.author: Fran Shelby

item.title: Pictory vs Lumen5 vs InVideo: Best AI Video Creator for Small Business
item.description: We tested all three AI video creators side by side. Here's which one actually delivers for small business content.
item.author: Fran Shelby

item.title: Chatbase Review 2026: Build Custom AI Chatbots for Your Website
item.description: This Chatbase review evaluates the platform's ability to create custom AI chatbots tailored to your business needs, providing a detailed look at its features, pricing, and competition.
item.author: Fran Shelby

item.title: ChatGPT Review 2026: The AI That Started It All — Still the Best?
item.description: This ChatGPT review explores whether the AI tool that started it all remains the best choice in 2026 for versatile writing and creative tasks.
item.author: Fran Shelby

item.title: Claude AI Review 2026: The Thoughtful Alternative to ChatGPT
item.description: In this Claude AI review, we delve into its thoughtful approach to AI writing, offering nuanced responses for writers, researchers, and developers.
item.author: Fran Shelby

item.title: Decktopus AI Review 2026: AI Presentations in Minutes
item.description: Our Decktopus AI review reveals how this AI presentation maker allows professionals to create polished slides in minutes, offering a competitive edge in the rapidly evolving market of AI productivity tools.
item.author: Fran Shelby

item.title: Easy Peasy AI Review 2026: All-in-One AI Writing Assistant
item.description: Our Easy Peasy AI review 2026 explores this affordable all-in-one tool for content creators seeking AI-driven writing and image generation capabilities.
item.author: Fran Shelby

item.title: ElevenLabs Review 2026: The Best AI Voice Generator for Creators?
item.description: This ElevenLabs review explores whether it stands as the best AI voice generator in 2026, evaluating its features, pricing, and competition.
item.author: Fran Shelby

item.title: Fliki Review 2026: Turn Text Into Videos with AI Voices
item.description: This Fliki review explores how the AI tool transforms text into video content with lifelike AI voices, making it a strong contender for content creators seeking efficiency.
item.author: Fran Shelby

item.title: Frase Review 2026: AI Content Optimization That Actually Ranks
item.description: Our Frase review reveals how this AI content optimization tool empowers content marketers with AI-driven briefs and SERP-optimized articles, standing out in a crowded field.
item.author: Fran Shelby

item.title: Google Gemini Review 2026: Can Google's AI Compete with ChatGPT?
item.description: This Google Gemini review explores how the AI tool integrates seamlessly into Google Workspace but faces stiff competition from ChatGPT and others in the AI writing space.
item.author: Fran Shelby

item.title: Grok Review 2026: Elon Musk's Unfiltered AI on X
item.description: Our Grok review explores Elon Musk's unfiltered AI tool, designed for X power users seeking real-time data integration and fewer content restrictions.
item.author: Fran Shelby

item.title: Julius AI Review 2026: AI Data Analysis for Non-Technical Teams
item.description: In this Julius AI review, we evaluate its capabilities as a user-friendly AI data analysis tool designed for non-technical teams. Discover its strengths, weaknesses, and how it stands against competitors.
item.author: Fran Shelby

item.title: Leonardo AI Review 2026: Free AI Image Generation That Punches Above Its Weight
item.description: In our Leonardo AI review, we explore how this free AI image generator stands out for game developers and creatives with its fine-tuning capabilities and affordable pricing.
item.author: Fran Shelby

item.title: Mangools Review 2026: Affordable SEO for Small Sites and Freelancers
item.description: In our Mangools review, we explore how this affordable SEO tool caters to freelancers and small sites with its robust keyword research and SERP analysis capabilities.
item.author: Fran Shelby

item.title: Midjourney Review 2026: The Gold Standard of AI Image Generation
item.description: Our Midjourney review 2026 evaluates why it stands as the gold standard in AI image generation, delivering unparalleled quality and functionality for designers and creators.
item.author: Fran Shelby

item.title: Mixo Review 2026: Launch a Website in 30 Seconds with AI
item.description: Our Mixo review explores how this AI website builder enables entrepreneurs to create landing pages in just 30 seconds, making it a top choice for rapid idea validation.
item.author: Fran Shelby

item.title: Mubert Review 2026: AI-Generated Music for Creators and Developers
item.description: In this Mubert review, we explore how AI-generated music is transforming content creation for YouTubers, podcasters, and app developers with its royalty-free tracks.
item.author: Fran Shelby

item.title: Perplexity Review 2026: AI Search Engine That Cites Its Sources
item.description: Our Perplexity review explores how this AI search engine stands out by providing cited, trustworthy answers for researchers and professionals.
item.author: Fran Shelby

item.description: Our Rytr review dives into its strengths as a budget AI writer for solopreneurs and freelancers needing quick content solutions without breaking the bank.

item.description: Our Simplified review explores how this all-in-one AI platform effectively combines design, writing, and video creation for small teams, but falls short in some areas.

item.description: Our Grammarly review examines its capabilities beyond basic spell checking, revealing why it's a top choice for professional writers seeking grammar, clarity, and tone assistance.

item.title: Pictory Review 2026: Turn Blog Posts Into Videos (Does It Actually Work?)
item.description: Pictory turns text into videos automatically using AI. We tested it with 20 real blog posts to see if the output is genuinely publish-worthy or just a gimmick.
item.author: Fran Shelby

item.description: Make.com (formerly Integromat) lets you build complex automations visually. We automated 15 real workflows over six weeks to test its limits and value.

item.description: We used Surfer SEO to optimize 20 articles over 90 days. Here is whether the $89/mo price tag is justified for freelancers and small content sites.

item.description: Descript promises text-based video editing that anyone can use. We spent 45 days editing real client projects to find out if it truly delivers.

item.title: Writesonic Review 2026: Best Budget AI Writer for Small Teams?
item.description: At $16/mo, Writesonic is one of the cheapest serious AI writers. We tested it for 30 days on real content to find out if budget pricing means budget quality.

item.description: We tested Jasper and Copy.ai on the exact same briefs — ads, blog posts, emails, and sales copy. Here is who wins and when each tool is better.
